reasoning: The Forbes article from April 2025 titled 'The Circle IPO Solidifies 2025 As The Year Of Stablecoins' strongly implies that the IPO process is either complete or very advanced by the spring of 2025. The specific mention of 'Circle Internet Group, Inc.' and 'New York Stock Exchange' in the resolution criteria likely stems from the specific language used in an official S-1 filing. Given that the knowledge cutoff is mid-May and the IPO was being discussed and solidified in early April, an IPO block completion before July 1, 2025, is highly probable. IPOs typically occur within 30-45 days of a public S-1 filing, placing the completion well before the July deadline. I estimate an 85% probability.
